name: claude-hooks-graph-event-routing
tags: session graph, event routing, user_prompt_submit, pre_tool_use, post_tool_use, stop, LangGraph, nodes, summarize_task_context
body:
Event routing in session_graph.py (one unified StateGraph for all 4 hook events):

- user_prompt_submit → load_turn → (task active?) → load_active_task → [tier-1 parallel] → summarize_task_context → [tier-2 parallel] → set_prompt_id → log_task_events → END (summarize_task_context inserted task:b9dded3e, 2026-07-04 — first-turn-gated compression of task context before the tier-2 fan-out)
- pre_tool_use       → gate_check → END
- post_tool_use      → log_tool_usage → (conditional bridge) → END
- stop               → noop → END

Key files: langchain_learning/session_graph.py (wiring), langchain_learning/nodes/registry.py (NODE_REGISTRY).
